page_hero.title: Our Products
page_hero.subtitle: Three specialist product lines — each engineered to the exacting demands of its application.

categories.name: Induction Heating
categories.subtitle: Capacitors for Induction Furnaces
categories.description: Resonant tank capacitors and banks for induction heating and melting systems. Built for continuous high-frequency operation in metal foundries.

categories.name: Pulse Capacitors
categories.subtitle: Pulsed Power for Fusion Energy
categories.description: High-energy, fast-discharge capacitors for nuclear fusion research and pulsed power systems. Sub-microsecond discharge with high cycle repeatability.

categories.name: High Voltage
categories.subtitle: Capacitors for Power Substations
categories.description: Shunt capacitor banks and harmonic filter capacitors for AC substations. 10 kV to 220 kV, GB/T and IEC compliant.

custom.title: Specifications that don't fit our catalogue?
body: Every installation is different. Our engineering team designs capacitor solutions to your exact voltage, capacitance, ESR, pulse width, cooling method, and form factor — from single prototype units to full production runs.
We work directly with your engineering team through design, testing, and commissioning, providing full technical documentation and after-sales support.

features.title: Fully Custom Design
features.body: Voltage, capacitance, ESR, form factor, cooling method — specified by you. We build to your datasheet.

features.title: Prototype to Production
features.body: Sample units in weeks. Full production runs with consistent quality and traceable batch documentation.

cta.title: Ready to discuss a project?
cta.body: Send us your specifications and our engineers will respond within one business day.
